name: Sol Mate
description: Trust-based social dApp on Solana — stake USDC to DM, match, and meet. No-shows get slashed.

skills.name: Wallet Authentication
skills.description: Authenticate via Solana wallet signature challenge. Returns JWT bearer token.

skills.name: Create Stake
skills.description: Stake USDC to enable DMs, room entry, or meetup proposals on Solana.
examples: Stake 0.01 USDC to send a DM
Stake 1.00 USDC to propose a meetup

skills.name: AI Matching
skills.description: Request an AI-powered match. Generates intro message using AINative LLM.
examples: Request a match with a user

skills.name: Stake-Gated Messaging
skills.description: Send messages to matched users. Requires active stake.

skills.name: Meetup Attestation
skills.description: Submit GPS-verified meetup confirmation. Resolves stake outcome.
examples: Confirm meetup happened with GPS coordinates

skills.name: Mint Moment NFT
skills.description: Mint a commemorative NFT on Solana after a confirmed meetup.
examples: Mint Sol Mate Moment NFT after meetup

skills.name: Gift SOL
skills.description: Transfer SOL to another user's wallet.
